caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, large black over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room decorated with framed photos and clothing. His shirt features the text "I CAN NEVER GO" above the word "SLIT". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone and speaks throughout the sequence, his facial expression shifting as he talks. In the background, a white male mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands near racks of colorful clothing. On the left side of the screen, a circular logo contains the text "TAPE", and a red logo on the right side says "THE REALLY HOT POD". The scene remains stationary, focusing on the man as he continues his conversation, with the only movement being the subtle gestures of his mouth and facial muscles as he speaks.
